title: Zo Hotline V4 — Prime Time
objective: Take Zo Hotline from working prototype to prime time: faster, cheaper, smarter, better-informed, self-improving

drops.title: Zozie Dashboard → Code-Controlled Migration
drops.notes: Migrated Zozie from VAPI assistantId to serverUrl. Both hotlines now use identical architecture.

drops.title: Webhook Infrastructure Upgrades
drops.notes: Delivered: caller profiles (phone-hash), knowledge index (93 entries), call spotlights, tool usage logging, prompt trim (53% reduction). Commit abe770a9f.

drops.title: Model Cost Optimization
drops.notes: Recommendation: Stay with Claude Haiku 4.5. Tone quality (25% weight) and tool calling reliability (20%) outweigh 30-85% model savings from cheaper alternatives. Real savings only ~$0.05/min on $0.18/min total. GPT-4o-mini documented as contingency if cost becomes critical. Voice provider swap (ElevenLabs → Cartesia) is a better cost lever.

drops.title: Use Case Research + Competitive Landscape
drops.notes: Delivered: 12 real community use cases, 6-competitor landscape table, messaging cheat sheet with concession-pivot framework, idealism/open-source talking points, gap analysis with 6 remaining gaps. 5 new knowledge files need concept mapping + index regen in D4.

drops.title: Conversation Design v3 — Capstone
drops.notes: Capstone complete. System prompt v4.0 (2,231 words). 3 pathways (Explorer/Builder/Comparison) with Socratic sequences. 3 new modes (Troubleshoot/Compare/Onboard). Master Pattern, anti-pattern blockers, emotional detection, technical calibration, competitive framework. Knowledge index regenerated to 98 entries. Daily analysis enhanced with messaging effectiveness tracking. Service restarted and verified with live test call.

drops.title: Zo Documentation Ingestion
drops.notes: Delivered: 41 platform docs, 5 skills registry docs, 6 conversational playbook files, ~280 concept mappings, freshness agent.
